title: Lesson 84
paragraph: This lesson focuses on practical B1 vocabulary for everyday communication.

words.meaning: a music group or a strip of material
words.example: The band played at the festival.

words.meaning: a long piece of metal or a place that serves drinks
words.example: Hold the metal bar for safety.

words.meaning: a container made of thin pieces of wood or plastic
words.example: She carried fruit in a basket.

words.meaning: a wash in a tub of water
words.example: I take a bath before bed.

words.meaning: a piece of furniture for sleeping
words.example: The bed was soft and warm.

words.meaning: a metal object or device that makes a ringing sound
a strip worn around the waist
a vehicle with two wheels moved by pedals
words.example: He rides a bicycle to school.

words.meaning: an animal with wings and feathers
words.example: A small bird sat on the roof.
Write your name at the bottom of the page.
